headline: Agoda Announces Asia's Top Family Activities for 2026, Shanghai Disneyland Tops the Chart
summary: As summer draws near and families eagerly start planning their holidays, activities and experiences remain at the heart of crafting a memorable family summer vacation. Digital travel platform Agoda reveals that Shanghai Disneyland tops the list of family activities in Asia, based on activities booked on Agoda between January 1 and April 15 this year. The data reveals that destinations that offer theme parks and unique viewpoints will be the go-to choices for family fun this summer.
